police complaint with Respondent No. 2. She then authorized 
her brother, Respondent No. 1, to act on her behalf to retrieve 
custody of Aadith. Thereupon, on 05.02.2024, the Appellant 
lodged a complaint with the NRI Cell in Chennai. In furtherance 
thereto, the Police Authorities in Chennai were able to retrieve 
Aadith’s passport number, along with the last known address 
and contact details of Respondent Nos. 5 and 6. However, 
Aadith and Respondent Nos. 4 to 6 remained untraceable.
3.10 Concurrently, in the guardianship proceedings pending before 
the Idaho Court, an Emergency Order came to be passed on 
22.02.2024, directing Aadith to return to Boise, Idaho within 72 
hours. When this direction was not followed, the Idaho Court 
proceeded to decide the Guardianship Application in favour of 
the Appellant, consequently appointing her as Aadith’s full and 
permanent guardian on 09.04.2024. This order was passed after
